description: Validate steer/follow_up/next_turn semantics remain stable in repo-worker workflow paths.
command: cargo test -p alan-runtime --lib runtime::submission_handlers::tests::test_handle_follow_up_without_active_turn_starts_new_turn -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime --lib runtime::submission_handlers::tests::test_handle_next_turn_is_queue_only_and_applies_on_next_turn -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime --lib runtime::tool_orchestrator::tests::test_handle_queued_steering_inputs_enforces_buffer_cap_for_follow_up -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime --lib runtime::engine::tests::test_should_drive_turn_submission -- --exact
assertions: follow_up queues and executes with expected behavior
next_turn remains queue-only until explicit new turn
turn-driving semantics stay consistent across repo-worker input modes
